opening_summary: This week, Groww's users have expressed dissatisfaction with the app's customer support, technical issues, and high brokerage charges.

top_themes.summary: Customers are experiencing difficulties with the app's customer support and service, citing unresponsive and unhelpful service.
Users are experiencing technical issues and app performance problems, including crashes, glitches, and slow loading.
Users are unhappy with the high brokerage charges associated with the app.

user_quotes.quote: I am facing significant difficulties in correcting my name on my Groww account.
har 2 din me update upar se interface bhi bekar aur brokerage charge bhi bahut jyada
To High charge Brocker and not good compare to other Brocker like profits add instead for trade

action_ideas.action: Improve customer support by increasing the number of support staff and providing 24/7 support
Conduct regular app updates and maintenance to resolve technical issues and improve performance
Review and adjust brokerage charges to be more competitive with other brokers

coverage_note: No play_store source file was supplied for this run. App Store public coverage did not reach the full requested lookback window.
